help.title: Sylva, The Wild Mother
help.body: Sylva represents the untamed growth of nature and the wisdom of instinct. She is worshipped by druids, rangers, and those who reject the rigid order of Light or the nihilism of Dark. Her blessings focus on Wisdom, Nature, and Survival.

help.title: Krog, The Primal Force
help.body: Krog is the embodiment of raw physical power and the survival of the fittest. He cares not for morality, only strength. His followers are often barbarians and warriors who seek to crush their enemies with overwhelming force.

help.title: Nox, The Silent Blade
help.body: Nox is the patron of assassins, thieves, and those who operate in the shadows. He values precision and the element of surprise. His blessings enhance Dexterity, Stealth, and Critical Strikes.

help.title: Solara, The Sun Queen
help.body: Solara brings the blinding truth of the sun. She represents order, hierarchy, and the burning purity of Light. Her followers are zealots and mages who wield fire and holy energy to purge the world of darkness.

help.title: Umbra, The Void
help.body: Umbra is the emptiness between stars. She represents the arcane mysteries of the void and the power of the mind to unravel reality. Her blessings focus on Intelligence, Curses, and Anti-Magic.

help.title: Aurelius, The Golden Shield
help.body: Aurelius is the defender of the weak and the champion of justice. He represents the protective aspect of Light. His blessings focus on Constitution, Defense, and Healing.

help.title: Valeros, The Arbiter
help.body: Valeros represents War, Justice, and the rigid order of the sword. He is the patron of Barbarians who fight for a cause and knights who enforce the law of Sanctum. Domains: Martial, Justice.

help.title: Celeris, The Messenger
help.body: Celeris is the fleet-footed guide of the Heavens. Patron of Monks and those who value speed over brute force. Domains: Precision, Speed.

help.title: Veritas, The All-Seeing
help.body: Veritas is the keeper of truth and the healer of the broken. His light exposes lies and mends the soul. Domains: Healing, Peace.

help.title: Fortuna, The Weaver
help.body: Fortuna controls the threads of fate. She is the light of luck and the guardian of destiny. Domains: Fortune, Destiny.

help.title: Goros, The Butcher
help.body: Goros thrives on slaughter and the ecstasy of pain. He is the dark mirror of Valeros, representing war's crueler side. Domains: Slaughter, Pain.

help.title: Xul, The Blood Lord
help.body: Xul is the master of undeath and the power contained within blood. Patron of Defilers. Domains: Blood, Undeath.

help.title: Omen, The Oracle
help.body: Omen is the harbinger of despair. He grants the power to curse one's enemies and feast on their fear. Domains: Curse, Fear.

help.title: Vesper, The Prince
help.body: Vesper is the chaotic heart of darkness. He represents the gamble of power and the elegance of individualism. Domains: Chaos, Gamble.

help.title: Fenris, The Hunter
help.body: Fenris is the unseen stalker of the wilds. He represents the thrill of the hunt and the speed of the predator. Domains: Hunt, Speed.

help.title: Ursoc, The Mountain
help.body: Ursoc is the resilience of the earth. He represents the endurance of the bear and the strength of the mountains. Domains: Resilience, Bear.

help.title: Corvus, The Trickster
help.body: Corvus is the clever mind of the forest. He represents cunning, strategy, and the power of the primal mind. Domains: Cunning, Mind.

help.title: Ranan, The Fox
help.body: Ranan is the whimsy of nature and the seeker of opportunity. He represents the freedom of the wild spirit. Domains: Whimsy, Opportunity.

help.title: The Three Kingdoms
help.body:
The world is divided into three primal philosophies:

LIGHT (Solas): Order, Civilization, Hierarchy. Capital: Sanctum.
DARK (Umbra): Ambition, Mystery, Individualism. Capital: Noxus.
INSTINCT (Sylva): Nature, Survival, Freedom. Capital: Ironbark.
